notes: Tool scope rejection (single-agent): the model calls 'get_fundamental_report', a tool that is not registered anywhere (expect_unregistered bypasses the harness schema assertion). Characterizes how the runner reports an unknown-tool call back to the model and logs it, and that the run still completes when the model recovers with a dashboard.

input.task: 分析贵州茅台的投资价值

transcript.content:
该工具不可用，改用现有数据输出保守仪表盘：
```json
{
  "stock_name": "贵州茅台",
  "sentiment_score": 52,
  "trend_prediction": "短期中性",
  "operation_advice": "观望",
  "decision_type": "hold",
  "confidence_level": "低",
  "dashboard": {
    "core_conclusion": {
      "one_sentence": "基本面工具不可用，暂以观望为主",
      "signal_type": "🟡持有观望",
      "position_advice": {
        "no_position": "暂不介入",
        "has_position": "持有观察"
      }
    },
    "battle_plan": {"support": 98.0, "resistance": 105.0, "stop_loss": 95.0},
    "phase_decision": {
      "phase_context": "部分工具不可用",
      "action_window": "工具恢复后",
      "immediate_action": "暂不操作",
      "watch_conditions": "基本面数据可用后复核",
      "next_check_time": "次日收盘",
      "confidence_reason": "缺少基本面数据",
      "data_limitations": "get_fundamental_report 工具不可用"
    }
  },
  "analysis_summary": "基本面工具不可用，仅凭有限数据维持观望。",
  "key_points": "工具缺失；观望",
  "risk_warning": "数据不完整，结论可靠性低"
}
```
